checklist_items.title: Verify key management for Guardian Multisig signers
checklist_items.description: Check if Guardian Multisig signers use robust key management practices (e.g., HSMs, cold storage) to protect their private keys.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: An attacker can compromise a sufficient number of Guardian Multisig signers' private keys.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement robust key management and security protocols for Guardian Multisig signers.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Documentation of key storage procedures, audit reports of key management systems.

checklist_items.title: Assess security protocols for Guardian Multisig operations
checklist_items.description: Review security protocols (e.g., access controls, monitoring) surrounding the operational environment used by Guardian Multisig signers for signing transactions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: An attacker can compromise a sufficient number of Guardian Multisig signers' private keys.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement robust key management and security protocols for Guardian Multisig signers.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Security policy documents, access control lists, monitoring configuration.

checklist_items.title: Audit Governance Contract cancellation validation logic
checklist_items.description: Review the Governance Contract code to ensure it rigorously validates cancellation request parameters and their integrity, preventing unauthorized modifications.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Contract does not fully validate the integrity of the cancellation request against the original intent.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Ensure cancellation request integrity through end-to-end signing and rigorous contract validation.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code audit report, formal verification results.

checklist_items.title: Verify end-to-end signing of cancellation transactions
checklist_items.description: Confirm that the process for generating, signing, and submitting Guardian Multisig cancellation transactions ensures data integrity from origin to contract execution.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: An attacker can intercept and modify a signed cancellation transaction before it is included in a block.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Ensure cancellation request integrity through end-to-end signing and rigorous contract validation.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Process documentation, transaction logs showing signed data matches received data.

checklist_items.title: Verify on-chain logging of Guardian Multisig signer identities
checklist_items.description: Check if the Governance Contract or associated logs immutably record the specific identities of Guardian Multisig signers who authorized a cancellation transaction.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The on-chain record of a multisig cancellation does not explicitly log the identities of the authorizing signers.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Design the multisig contract to log authorized signer identities on-chain for transparency and accountability.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Transaction logs/events for a multisig cancellation, contract code review verifying event emission.

checklist_items.title: Review secure communication practices for Guardian Multisig
checklist_items.description: Assess the security of communication channels used by Guardian Multisig members for discussing proposal cancellations (e.g., encrypted channels, private meetings).
checklist_items.assumption_ref: These discussions or related sensitive data are stored or communicated insecurely.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement secure communication channels and data storage for Guardian Multisig operations.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Security policies regarding confidential communication, meeting notes protocols.

checklist_items.title: Audit data storage security for Guardian Multisig records
checklist_items.description: Verify that any records related to Guardian Multisig decisions or discussions are stored securely with appropriate access controls and encryption.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: These discussions or related sensitive data are stored or communicated insecurely.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement secure communication channels and data storage for Guardian Multisig operations.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Data storage policy, access control lists for relevant systems, encryption configuration.

checklist_items.title: Verify transaction prioritization for Guardian Multisig actions
checklist_items.description: Confirm that Guardian Multisig transactions, especially cancellation requests, are configured for high priority to ensure timely inclusion during network congestion.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Network congestion or transaction queue limits prevent the Guardian Multisig's cancellation transaction from being included/processed within the timelock.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement transaction prioritization for critical governance actions and mechanisms to prevent timelock queue spam.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Documentation of transaction submission strategy, gas fee settings for Guardian transactions, network node configuration.

checklist_items.title: Audit Governance Contract for timelock queue spam prevention
checklist_items.description: Review the Governance Contract to ensure it has mechanisms (e.g., gas limits, transaction fees, call limits) to prevent the timelock execution queue from being spammed, ensuring space for critical cancellations.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Network congestion or transaction queue limits prevent the Guardian Multisig's cancellation transaction from being included/processed within the timelock.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement transaction prioritization for critical governance actions and mechanisms to prevent timelock queue spam.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code audit report of Governance Contract, specific code sections for queue management and transaction handling.

checklist_items.title: Audit Governance Contract access control for cancellation
checklist_items.description: Review the Governance Contract code to ensure only the authorized Guardian Multisig (and its required threshold) can call the cancellation function.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Contract's access control for the cancellation function is vulnerable.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Conduct thorough smart contract audits, implement strict access controls, and ensure robust multisig logic.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code audit report focusing on access control, formal verification results.

checklist_items.title: Verify robust implementation of Guardian Multisig logic
checklist_items.description: Audit the implementation of the 5-of-9 Guardian Multisig logic used for cancellations to ensure it correctly enforces the required threshold and prevents bypasses.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: An attacker can exploit a contract vulnerability or bypass multisig requirements.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Conduct thorough smart contract audits, implement strict access controls, and ensure robust multisig logic.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Smart contract audit report focusing on multisig implementation, penetration test results.

checklist_items.title: Verify key management for protocol deployment accounts
checklist_items.description: Check if Protocol/Ecosystem Projects (Actor 3) use robust key management practices for accounts used to deploy contracts, especially Reward Vaults.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: An attacker can obtain or compromise the private keys of Actor 3.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement multi-factor authentication or stricter key management for privileged accounts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Documentation of key management policy for deployment accounts, confirmation of practices with partner teams.

checklist_items.title: Evaluate multi-factor authentication for deployment accounts
checklist_items.description: Assess if multi-factor authentication is implemented for login or transaction signing for accounts used by Protocol/Ecosystem Projects (Actor 3) to deploy contracts.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: An attacker can obtain or compromise the private keys of Actor 3.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement multi-factor authentication or stricter key management for privileged accounts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Confirmation of MFA implementation, system configuration review.

checklist_items.title: Verify robust transaction signing and verification
checklist_items.description: Check if transaction signing by Actor 3 and verification by the network (Component 1) is robust enough to detect tampering of deployment transaction data.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The network accepts tampered transactions before finality.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Ensure robust transaction signing and verification; use secure network endpoints.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Penetration test report, protocol specification review.

checklist_items.title: Confirm use of secure network endpoints for deployment
checklist_items.description: Verify that Protocol/Ecosystem Projects (Actor 3) use secure, authenticated network endpoints (RPCs) when submitting deployment transactions to Berachain (Component 1).
checklist_items.assumption_ref: An attacker can intercept and modify transaction data between the initiator and the network.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Ensure robust transaction signing and verification; use secure network endpoints.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Documentation of partner integration requirements, confirmation of endpoint configuration.

checklist_items.title: Verify rate limiting on network endpoints
checklist_items.description: Check if network endpoints (RPCs) used for transaction submission (including contract deployments) have effective rate limiting to prevent DoS attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The endpoint used by Actor 3 is vulnerable to DoS attacks.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement rate limiting and DoS mitigation on network endpoints; ensure sufficient network capacity.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Stress test report, network endpoint configuration files.

checklist_items.title: Assess overall network capacity and DoS resilience
checklist_items.description: Review the overall design and capacity of the Berachain network (Component 1) to withstand transaction volume spikes and DoS attempts.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: An attacker can generate sufficient transaction volume to cause network congestion.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement rate limiting and DoS mitigation on network endpoints; ensure sufficient network capacity.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Network architecture documentation, capacity planning reports, incident response playbooks for DoS.

checklist_items.title: Mandate and verify security audits for Reward Vault contracts
checklist_items.description: Ensure that all Reward Vault contracts proposed for whitelisting via governance are subjected to rigorous security audits by qualified third parties before deployment or integration.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A malicious contract deployed by Actor 3 can exploit vulnerabilities in the system or other contracts.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement contract code auditing requirements; ensure system components interact safely with external contracts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Policy documentation for mandatory audits, audit reports for whitelisted Reward Vaults, confirmation of audit scope.

checklist_items.title: Assess safety of system interactions with external contracts
checklist_items.description: Review how core Berachain system components (Component 1, 5, 6, 8, 9, etc.) interact with potentially untrusted external contracts like Reward Vaults to prevent exploitation via malicious contract logic.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A malicious contract deployed by Actor 3 can exploit vulnerabilities in the system or other contracts.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Ensure system components interact safely with external contracts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: System architecture review, smart contract code review of external calls, security design documentation.

checklist_items.title: Verify authentication for RFRV proposal submission
checklist_items.description: Check if the governance submission process requires strong authentication (e.g., transaction signing from authorized addresses/multi-sig) to prevent spoofing of RFRV proposals.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Governance proposal submission relies on transaction signature for origin verification; compromise of keys allows spoofing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement multi-signature control for proposal submission from partner systems; enhance monitoring of proposals.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Governance contract code review, protocol specification.

checklist_items.title: Enhance monitoring of new governance proposals
checklist_items.description: Implement enhanced monitoring and alerting for newly submitted governance proposals, especially RFRVs, to quickly detect potentially fraudulent submissions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: An attacker can obtain or compromise the private keys of Actor 3.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement multi-signature control for proposal submission from partner systems; enhance monitoring of proposals.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Monitoring system configuration, alert logs for new proposals.

checklist_items.title: Audit Governance Contract for robust proposal data validation
checklist_items.description: Review the Governance Contract code to ensure it performs rigorous validation and parsing of RFRV proposal data, including verifying cryptographic hashes/signatures if applicable, to prevent tampering.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The governance contract is vulnerable to accepting or misinterpreting tampered proposal data.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Ensure cryptographic hashing/signing of proposal content; robust parsing and validation of proposal data in the contract.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code audit report of Governance Contract focusing on proposal data handling.

checklist_items.title: Verify proposal submission fees or resource limits
checklist_items.description: Check if the governance process or contract implements fees or resource limits on proposal submission to deter spam attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: An attacker can generate sufficient invalid or resource-intensive proposals to disrupt the governance contract.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement proposal submission fees or resource limits; monitor and mitigate network spam.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Protocol documentation, Governance contract code review for fee/limit enforcement.

checklist_items.title: Monitor and mitigate network spam impacting governance
checklist_items.description: Implement monitoring for network-wide transaction spam that could prevent legitimate governance proposal transactions from being included in blocks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Network congestion prevents legitimate proposal transactions from being included in blocks.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement proposal submission fees or resource limits; monitor and mitigate network spam.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Network monitoring configuration, incident response procedures for network congestion.

checklist_items.title: Define and enforce strict RFRV review criteria
checklist_items.description: Establish and enforce clear, strict criteria for reviewing and approving Request for Reward Vault (RFRV) proposals before they proceed to a governance vote.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A malicious RFRV proposal, if passed, would result in a harmful Reward Vault being whitelisted.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict RFRV review criteria; enhance community/Guardian proposal vetting processes; rigorous security audits of proposed vaults.
checklist_items.evidence_required: RFRV review policy document, examples of review checklists/reports.

checklist_items.title: Assess effectiveness of community/Guardian proposal vetting
checklist_items.description: Evaluate the effectiveness of the processes used by the community and the Guardian Multisig to identify and challenge potentially malicious RFRV proposals during the governance lifecycle.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The governance voting/Guardian cancellation process fails to identify and stop a malicious RFRV proposal.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict RFRV review criteria; enhance community/Guardian proposal vetting processes; rigorous security audits of proposed vaults.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Documentation of vetting procedures, records of proposal discussions/challenges, post-mortem analysis of past proposals.

checklist_items.title: Implement user education on frontend authenticity
checklist_items.description: Develop and promote educational materials and warnings on the official BeraHub channels instructing users how to verify the authenticity of the website and avoid phishing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: User trusts the frontend application implicitly.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Educate users about verifying website authenticity, use browser extensions for site verification, enforce strong wallet security practices.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Published educational materials, links to guides/blog posts, communication plan.

checklist_items.title: Promote and integrate site verification tools
checklist_items.description: Encourage users to use browser extensions or tools that verify website authenticity and potentially integrate checks into the frontend itself (e.g., ENS, SSL validation guidance).
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A malicious replica of the BeraHub frontend exists.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Educate users about verifying website authenticity, use browser extensions for site verification, enforce strong wallet security practices.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Website features promoting verification, guides on using tools, security features integrated into frontend.

checklist_items.title: Audit BEX smart contract for swap parameter validation
checklist_items.description: Review the BEX smart contract code to ensure it rigorously validates swap transaction parameters (e.g., minimum received amount/slippage, recipient) to prevent tampering.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The smart contract does not sufficiently validate or re-verify all transaction parameters against user intent (though wallet signatures cover some aspects).
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Ensure smart contract validates key parameters.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code audit report focusing on swap function validation, formal verification results.

checklist_items.title: Promote and verify usage of encrypted RPC connections
checklist_items.description: Encourage users and dApps to use encrypted RPC connections (e.g., HTTPS, WSS) when interacting with the network to mitigate transaction tampering risks in transit.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Attacker can intercept and modify network traffic between the user's wallet/RPC and the blockchain node.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use encrypted RPC connections, employ transaction monitoring, ensure smart contract validates key parameters.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Educational materials, dApp integration guides, confirmation of RPC endpoint support for encryption.

checklist_items.title: Verify on-chain recording and verifiability of governance votes
checklist_items.description: Check if the Governance Contract immutably records each vote with sufficient detail (e.g., voter address, vote choice, vote weight) linked via transaction signature for verifiability, preventing repudiation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: If vote submission is not cryptographically signed and permanently recorded on-chain, a user could falsely deny having cast a specific vote.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement on-chain voting with transaction signatures, ensure transparent and immutable record of votes.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Governance contract code review focusing on voting/logging functions, example transaction logs showing vote details.

checklist_items.title: Audit security of frontend data fetching endpoints
checklist_items.description: Review the security of backend services and RPC endpoints used by the BeraHub frontend (Component 3) to fetch user-specific data (balances, rewards, history) to prevent unauthorized access or compromise.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The BeraHub frontend or its data sources (RPC, backend services) are compromised.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict security measures for frontend hosting and data fetching endpoints, use read-only RPCs where possible, limit sensitive data display.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Security audit report of backend services/APIs, access control configurations for endpoints.

checklist_items.title: Review sensitive data displayed on frontend
checklist_items.description: Assess the type and granularity of sensitive user data displayed on the BeraHub frontend (Component 3) and consider limiting details where possible to reduce the impact of a frontend compromise.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Sensitive information (e.g., detailed transaction history, specific wallet interactions) is displayed by the frontend.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict security measures for frontend hosting and data fetching endpoints, use read-only RPCs where possible, limit sensitive data display.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Frontend design documents, UI mockups showing data display.

checklist_items.title: Audit BGTIncentiveDistributor for Denial of Service vulnerabilities
checklist_items.description: Review the BGTIncentiveDistributor smart contract code for vulnerabilities (e.g., excessive gas costs, unbounded loops) that could be exploited for Denial of Service.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The BGTIncentiveDistributor contract has a vulnerability exploitable for DoS.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement rate limiting and anti-spam measures on the smart contract and RPC endpoints, ensure robust off-chain proof service (if applicable), monitor contract gas usage and activity.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code audit report focusing on DoS resilience, gas usage analysis.

checklist_items.title: Implement rate limiting for claim function calls
checklist_items.description: Implement rate limiting or other anti-spam measures on the BGTIncentiveDistributor contract's claim function and associated RPC endpoints to prevent transaction spam attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Attacker can spam the network or contract function calls to block legitimate claims.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement rate limiting and anti-spam measures on the smart contract and RPC endpoints, ensure robust off-chain proof service (if applicable), monitor contract gas usage and activity.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Smart contract code review for rate limiting, RPC endpoint configuration.

checklist_items.title: Monitor BGTIncentiveDistributor contract activity and gas usage
checklist_items.description: Implement monitoring and alerting for unusual transaction volume or gas usage patterns on the BGTIncentiveDistributor contract to detect potential DoS attempts.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Attacker can spam the network or contract function calls to block legitimate claims.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement rate limiting and anti-spam measures on the smart contract and RPC endpoints, ensure robust off-chain proof service (if applicable), monitor contract gas usage and activity.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Monitoring system configuration, alert rules for contract activity.

checklist_items.title: Educate users on token approval risks and best practices
checklist_items.description: Develop and disseminate educational materials warning users about the risks of granting excessive token approvals and recommending best practices (e.g., minimal approvals, revoking unused approvals).
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Attacker tricks user into signing a transaction granting excessive token approval (e.g., unlimited spend).
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Educate users on approval risks, recommend spending limits for approvals, use secure wallet practices, audit smart contracts for approval vulnerabilities.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Published educational materials, community outreach efforts.

checklist_items.title: Audit BEX and related contracts for approval vulnerabilities
checklist_items.description: Review the BEX smart contract (Component 5) and any other contracts handling user token approvals for vulnerabilities that could allow unauthorized spending or manipulation of approvals.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Smart contract (e.g., BEX) has a vulnerability allowing unauthorized asset spending.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Audit smart contracts for approval vulnerabilities.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Smart contract audit report focusing on token approval mechanisms.

checklist_items.title: Verify strong key management for Incentive Token Managers
checklist_items.description: Check if wallets used by Incentive Token Managers (Actor 5) for managing Reward Vaults employ strong key protection mechanisms (e.g., hardware wallets, multi-signature wallets).
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Incentive Token Manager's private key is compromised.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong key management practices for the Incentive Token Manager account, potentially using multi-sig or hardware security modules.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Documentation of recommended key management practices for partners, confirmation of practices.

checklist_items.title: Audit Reward Vault rate management logic
checklist_items.description: Review the Reward Vault smart contract code (Component 8) to ensure rigorous enforcement of documented rules for managing incentive rates (e.g., preventing decreases while supply exists).
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault smart contract (Component 8) contains a vulnerability allowing rate changes that violate documented protocol rules.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Conduct thorough smart contract audits and formal verification of the Reward Vault contract logic, especially rate management functions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Smart contract audit report focusing on rate management functions, formal verification results.

checklist_items.title: Verify transaction rate limiting on Reward Vault interactions
checklist_items.description: Check if the Reward Vault contract (Component 8) or network endpoints interacting with it implement rate limiting or similar controls to prevent DoS via excessive transactions (deposits, rate changes).
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The network (Component 1) or Reward Vault contract (Component 8) has insufficient rate limiting or gas cost protection against excessive transactions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement transaction rate limiting... on the smart contract and RPC endpoints...
checklist_items.evidence_required: Reward Vault code review for rate limits, RPC endpoint configuration.

checklist_items.title: Monitor activity from Incentive Token Manager accounts
checklist_items.description: Implement monitoring and alerting for unusual or excessive transaction activity initiated by Incentive Token Manager accounts (Actor 5) that target Reward Vaults.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Incentive Token Manager account is compromised or acting maliciously.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement transaction rate limiting, monitor activity from privileged accounts...
checklist_items.evidence_required: Monitoring system configuration, alert rules for specific addresses/contract interactions.

checklist_items.title: Audit Reward Vault gas costs for processing burden
checklist_items.description: Review the Reward Vault smart contract code (Component 8) to ensure transaction gas costs accurately reflect the computational burden and deter resource exhaustion attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The network (Component 1) or Reward Vault contract (Component 8) has insufficient rate limiting or gas cost protection against excessive transactions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: ...ensure smart contract gas costs reflect processing burden.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code audit report focusing on gas optimization/DoS, gas cost analysis tools results.

checklist_items.title: Verify server security for validator nodes
checklist_items.description: Check if validator node infrastructure (Component 2) adheres to strong server security practices (e.g., patching, hardening, firewalls).
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Attacker gains unauthorized access to the Validator Node server.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong server security... for validator nodes.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Server hardening checklists, firewall rules, vulnerability scan reports.

checklist_items.title: Audit access controls on validator nodes
checklist_items.description: Review user accounts and access controls on validator node servers (Component 2) to ensure only authorized personnel have access to sensitive data and configurations.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Sensitive configuration or internal state data is not adequately ... access-controlled on the node.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: ...access controls... for sensitive data on validator nodes.
checklist_items.evidence_required: User lists, access control lists, security group configurations.

checklist_items.title: Verify encryption of sensitive data on validator nodes
checklist_items.description: Check if sensitive data (e.g., private keys, configuration files) stored on validator node servers (Component 2) is adequately encrypted at rest.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Sensitive configuration or internal state data is not adequately encrypted... on the node.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: ...encryption for sensitive data on validator nodes.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Encryption configuration details, volume encryption status.

checklist_items.title: Implement and verify resource limits on validator nodes
checklist_items.description: Ensure that validator node servers (Component 2) have appropriate resource limits (CPU, memory, disk I/O) configured to prevent resource exhaustion attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Attacker can overwhelm the Validator Node's resources (CPU, memory, network).
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement robust node monitoring, resource limits... for validator nodes.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Operating system/container resource configuration.

checklist_items.title: Verify robust network protection (DDoS mitigation) for validator nodes
checklist_items.description: Check if validator node network infrastructure (Component 2) is protected by appropriate network-level defenses, such as DDoS mitigation services or firewall rules.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator Node is vulnerable to network-level attacks (e.g., DDoS) or has single points of failure in its infrastructure.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: ...network protection (e.g., DDoS mitigation) for validator nodes.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Network architecture diagrams, firewall rules, DDoS protection service subscription/configuration.

checklist_items.title: Assess resilience of validator node infrastructure
checklist_items.description: Review the underlying infrastructure hosting validator nodes (Component 2) for resilience against single points of failure.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator Node is vulnerable to network-level attacks (e.g., DDoS) or has single points of failure in its infrastructure.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: ...resilient infrastructure... for validator nodes.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Infrastructure architecture diagrams, hosting provider resilience reports.

checklist_items.title: Implement robust monitoring for validator node health
checklist_items.description: Ensure comprehensive monitoring is in place for key metrics of validator node health and performance (CPU, memory, disk, network, consensus participation) to detect operational issues or attacks promptly.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Attacker can overwhelm the Validator Node's resources (CPU, memory, network).
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement robust node monitoring, resource limits... for validator nodes.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Monitoring system configuration, alert thresholds and rules.

checklist_items.title: Implement secure configuration management for validator nodes
checklist_items.description: Ensure that validator node configurations, including the incentive commission rate, are managed securely using version control and integrity checks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Configuration system lacks adequate access control or integrity checks for the commission rate setting.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement secure configuration management and granular access controls for validator node settings. Ensure commission rate changes have on-chain visibility or required confirmations.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Configuration management tool usage, process documentation for configuration changes.

checklist_items.title: Verify granular access controls for validator node settings
checklist_items.description: Check if access controls on validator node configuration systems (Component 2) are granular, ensuring only authorized users can modify sensitive settings like the commission rate.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Attacker gains unauthorized access to the Validator Node configuration interface.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement secure configuration management and granular access controls for validator node settings. Ensure commission rate changes have on-chain visibility or required confirmations.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Access control matrix, system permission settings review.

checklist_items.title: Ensure on-chain visibility or confirmation for commission rate changes
checklist_items.description: Verify that changes to a validator's incentive commission rate are either recorded immutably on-chain or require explicit on-chain confirmation by the operator, visible to boosted users.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Changes to the commission rate are not sufficiently transparent or verifiable by boosted users off-chain.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement secure configuration management and granular access controls for validator node settings. Ensure commission rate changes have on-chain visibility or required confirmations.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Validator software documentation, blockchain explorer review of rate change events.

checklist_items.title: Verify strong key management for validator staking keys
checklist_items.description: Check if Validator Operators (Actor 2) use robust key management practices (e.g., HSMs, cold storage) for the private keys used to sign BERA staking transactions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Attacker compromises the Validator Operator's private key used for staking.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong key management practices for validator operators. Encourage/require hardware security modules (HSMs) for staking keys. Consider multi-signature schemes or timelocks for high-value staking actions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Documentation of key management procedures, confirmation of HSM/cold storage usage.

checklist_items.title: Evaluate multi-signature or timelocks for BERA staking actions
checklist_items.description: Consider implementing multi-signature requirements or timelocks for critical BERA staking actions (unstaking, withdrawal) by Validator Operators to add layers of security beyond a single compromised key.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The staking contract relies solely on transaction signature authentication from the compromised key.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong key management practices for validator operators. Encourage/require hardware security modules (HSMs) for staking keys. Consider multi-signature schemes or timelocks for high-value staking actions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Staking contract code review, protocol design documents.

checklist_items.title: Monitor network for congestion impacting validator transactions
checklist_items.description: Implement monitoring and alerting for network congestion or potential censorship that could prevent Validator Operator staking/unstaking transactions from being included on chain.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Network is susceptible to transaction spam or censorship by malicious actors (potentially other validators).
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement network monitoring for congestion/censorship. Explore validator-specific transaction prioritization or alternative submission methods for critical operations.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Network monitoring configuration, alert rules.

checklist_items.title: Evaluate transaction prioritization for validator staking actions
checklist_items.description: Explore and potentially implement mechanisms for prioritizing validator staking/unstaking transactions to ensure their timely inclusion during network congestion.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator's transaction submission for staking/unstaking is not prioritized or protected against network congestion.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement network monitoring for congestion/censorship. Explore validator-specific transaction prioritization or alternative submission methods for critical operations.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Protocol design documents, implementation plan for transaction prioritization.

checklist_items.title: Audit Execution Client validation of block content
checklist_items.description: Review the Execution Client code (Component 17, part of Component 1) to ensure it fully validates the integrity and transaction validity of block content before passing it to the consensus layer.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Execution Client (17) does not fully validate block integrity or transaction validity before returning the executed block data (Data Flow 33) to the Validator Node (2).
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement robust block validation checks by other validators and Execution Client. Utilize strong slashing conditions for malicious block proposals (e.g., invalid state transitions, provable censorship).
checklist_items.evidence_required: Execution Client code audit report focusing on block validation logic.

checklist_items.title: Audit consensus mechanism validation of proposed blocks
checklist_items.description: Review the CometBFT consensus implementation (part of Component 1) and validator software (Component 2) to ensure other validators rigorously validate proposed blocks for integrity and reject malicious ones.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The consensus mechanism (CometBFT) or other validators (part of Component 1) do not sufficiently detect or reject all forms of malicious block tampering during validation.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement robust block validation checks by other validators and Execution Client. Utilize strong slashing conditions for malicious block proposals (e.g., invalid state transitions, provable censorship).
checklist_items.evidence_required: Consensus protocol specification, validator software code review focusing on block validation.

checklist_items.title: Verify strong slashing conditions for malicious block proposals
checklist_items.description: Check that the protocol includes robust slashing conditions and mechanisms to penalize validators that propose malicious blocks or violate block integrity rules.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Slashing mechanisms are ineffective or slow to penalize validators proposing malicious blocks.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Utilize strong slashing conditions for malicious block proposals (e.g., invalid state transitions, provable censorship).
checklist_items.evidence_required: Protocol documentation on slashing conditions, smart contract code review for slashing logic.

checklist_items.title: Audit BGT Distributor/Reward Vault contracts for emission validation
checklist_items.description: Review the BGTIncentiveDistributor (Component 13) and Reward Vault (Component 8) smart contracts to ensure they validate the source and destination of BGT emissions, accepting only from authorized validators and directed to whitelisted vaults.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: On-chain Reward Vault or Distributor contracts (like Component 13) do not fully validate the source or destination of emissions received from the validator.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Ensure on-chain contracts (e.g., Distributor, Reward Vaults) validate emission sources and destinations (e.g., only accept emissions directed to whitelisted Reward Vaults from authorized validators). Implement monitoring and potential penalties for misdirected emissions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Smart contract audit report focusing on emission reception logic.

checklist_items.title: Verify validator software restricts BGT emission destinations
checklist_items.description: Check if validator node software (Component 2) is configured or designed to restrict BGT emissions only to whitelisted Reward Vaults as intended by the protocol.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator Node software allows the operator to configure arbitrary or invalid BGT emission destinations.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Ensure on-chain contracts (e.g., Distributor, Reward Vaults) validate emission sources and destinations (e.g., only accept emissions directed to whitelisted Reward Vaults from authorized validators). Implement monitoring and potential penalties for misdirected emissions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Validator software documentation, configuration review.

checklist_items.title: Monitor for misdirected BGT emissions
checklist_items.description: Implement monitoring and alerting to detect instances where BGT emissions appear to be misdirected by validators to unauthorized addresses or non-whitelisted entities, enabling potential penalties.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: There are no effective monitoring or penalty mechanisms for validators who misdirect emissions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement monitoring and potential penalties for misdirected emissions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Monitoring system configuration, alert rules for BGT transfers from validator accounts.
